items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Window to Find Survivors Is Closing as Rescuers Battle Through Aftershocks
items.summary: More than three days after twin earthquakes devastated the Venezuelan coast, the rescue effort faced chaos and delays as the chances of finding survivors diminished.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Can the ICJ help end the war in the eastern DRC?
items.summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo takes Rwanda to the International Court of Justice.

items.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
items.summary: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.
